metadata.description: Psypowers — a Claude Code plugin for psychological consultations: intake, diagnosis (ICD-11), session tracking, progress monitoring, and evidence-based therapeutic practices.

plugins.name: psy
plugins.description: Psychological consultation toolkit — intake, diagnosis (ICD-11), session tracking, progress monitoring, and evidence-based therapeutic practices across CBT, DBT, ACT, mindfulness, somatic, art therapy, EMDR, psychodynamic, and positive psychology modalities.
